headline: 1 Consumer Stock with Competitive Advantages and 2 We Find Risky
summary: Consumer staples stocks are solid insurance policies in frothy markets ripe for corrections. But they’re also double-edged swords as they often lag in booming conditions, and this pattern has persisted recently. Over the past six months, the industry has recorded a loss of 3.9%, a far cry from the S&P 500’s 8.4% ascent.

headline: TD Cowen Maintains Hold on Estee Lauder Cos, Raises Price Target to $90
summary: TD Cowen  analyst Oliver Chen   maintains Estee Lauder Cos (NYSE:EL) with a Hold and raises the price target from $85 to $90.

headline: Barclays Maintains Equal-Weight on Estee Lauder Cos, Raises Price Target to $80
summary: Barclays  analyst Lauren Lieberman   maintains Estee Lauder Cos (NYSE:EL) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $75 to $80.
